option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <?import javafx.geometry.Insets?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Button?> <?import javafx.scene.control.ComboBox?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Label?> <?import javafx.scene.control.PasswordField?> <?import javafx.scene.control.TextField?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.HBox?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.Region?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.StackPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.VBox?>
<StackPane prefHeight="920.0" prefWidth="1380.0" styleClass="login-root" stylesheets="@esportify/login.css" xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/21" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1" fx:controller="edu.ProjetPI.controllers.RegisterController"> <children> <Region maxHeight="1.7976931348623157E308" maxWidth="1.7976931348623157E308" styleClass="arena-background" /> <Region maxHeight="1.7976931348623157E308" maxWidth="1.7976931348623157E308" styleClass="arena-overlay" />
<HBox alignment="CENTER" fillHeight="false"> <children> <VBox alignment="CENTER" maxWidth="560.0" prefWidth="560.0" spacing="18.0" styleClass="login-card register-card"> <padding> <Insets bottom="34.0" left="42.0" right="42.0" top="28.0" /> </padding>
<Label styleClass="brand-badge" text="*" /> <Label styleClass="brand-name register-brand" text="E-SPORTIFY" /> <Label styleClass="screen-title register-title" text="CREER UN COMPTE" />
<VBox spacing="14.0"> <children> <HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="14.0" styleClass="input-shell"> <children> <Label styleClass="input-icon accent-pink" text="N" /> <TextField fx:id="fullNameField" promptText="Nom complet" styleClass="login-input" /> </children> </HBox>
<HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="14.0" styleClass="input-shell"> <children> <Label styleClass="input-icon accent-pink" text="U" /> <TextField fx:id="pseudoField" promptText="Pseudo" styleClass="login-input" /> </children> </HBox>
<HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="14.0" styleClass="input-shell"> <children> <Label styleClass="input-icon accent-pink" text="E" /> <TextField fx:id="emailField" promptText="Email" styleClass="login-input" /> </children> </HBox>
<HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="14.0" styleClass="input-shell"> <children> <Label styleClass="input-icon accent-blue" text="P" /> <PasswordField fx:id="passwordField" onAction="#handleRegister" promptText="Mot de passe" styleClass="login-input" /> </children> </HBox>
<HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="14.0" styleClass="input-shell"> <children> <Label styleClass="input-icon accent-blue" text="R" /> <ComboBox fx:id="roleBox" maxWidth="1.7976931348623157E308" promptText="Choisir un role" styleClass="register-role-box" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" /> </children> </HBox> </children> </VBox>
<Button maxWidth="1.7976931348623157E308" onAction="#handleRegister" styleClass="primary-login-button" text="CREER LE COMPTE" /> <Button maxWidth="1.7976931348623157E308" onAction="#goToLogin" styleClass="faceid-button" text="Retour a la connexion" />
<Label fx:id="messageLabel" maxWidth="1.7976931348623157E308" styleClass="message login-message" wrapText="true" /> <Label styleClass="register-note" text="Inscription reservee aux roles joueur et manager." /> </VBox> </children> </HBox> </children> </StackPane>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <?import javafx.geometry.Insets?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Button?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Label?> <?import javafx.scene.control.PasswordField?> <?import javafx.scene.control.TextField?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.HBox?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.Region?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.StackPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.VBox?>
<StackPane prefHeight="920.0" prefWidth="1380.0" styleClass="login-root" stylesheets="@esportify/login.css" xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/21" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1" fx:controller="edu.ProjetPI.controllers.RegisterController"> <children> <Region maxHeight="1.7976931348623157E308" maxWidth="1.7976931348623157E308" styleClass="arena-background" /> <Region maxHeight="1.7976931348623157E308" maxWidth="1.7976931348623157E308" styleClass="arena-overlay" />
<HBox alignment="CENTER" fillHeight="false"> <children> <VBox alignment="CENTER" maxWidth="560.0" prefWidth="560.0" spacing="18.0" styleClass="login-card register-card"> <padding> <Insets bottom="34.0" left="42.0" right="42.0" top="28.0" /> </padding>
<Label styleClass="brand-badge" text="*" /> <Label styleClass="brand-name" text="E-SPORTIFY" /> <Label styleClass="screen-title" text="CREER UN COMPTE" />
<VBox spacing="14.0"> <children> <HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="14.0" styleClass="input-shell"> <children> <Label styleClass="input-icon accent-pink" text="N" /> <TextField fx:id="fullNameField" promptText="Nom complet" styleClass="login-input" /> </children> </HBox>
<HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="14.0" styleClass="input-shell"> <children> <Label styleClass="input-icon accent-pink" text="U" /> <TextField fx:id="pseudoField" promptText="Pseudo" styleClass="login-input" /> </children> </HBox>
<HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="14.0" styleClass="input-shell"> <children> <Label styleClass="input-icon accent-pink" text="E" /> <TextField fx:id="emailField" promptText="Email" styleClass="login-input" /> </children> </HBox>
<HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="14.0" styleClass="input-shell"> <children> <Label styleClass="input-icon accent-blue" text="P" /> <PasswordField fx:id="passwordField" onAction="#handleRegister" promptText="Mot de passe" styleClass="login-input" /> </children> </HBox> </children> </VBox>
<Button maxWidth="1.7976931348623157E308" onAction="#handleRegister" styleClass="primary-login-button" text="CREER LE COMPTE" /> <Button maxWidth="1.7976931348623157E308" onAction="#goToLogin" styleClass="faceid-button" text="Retour a la connexion" />
<Label fx:id="messageLabel" maxWidth="1.7976931348623157E308" styleClass="message login-message" wrapText="true" /> </VBox> </children> </HBox> </children> </StackPane>

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
